channel.title: Docs on 坐忘道琼峰
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on 坐忘道琼峰

item.title: Python Development on NixOS
item.description: Discourse NixOS 该部分文章尚未完成。 Impure Python Poetry devShell (pkgs.poetry.override { python = pkgs.python39; }) poetry run python -c "import matplotlib" Traceback (most recent call last): File "<string>", line 1, in <module> ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'matplotlib' python -m site sys.path = [ '/home/asymmetric/code/foo', '/nix/store/6qk2ybm2yx2dxmx9h4dikr1shjhhbpfr-python3-3.10.11/lib/python310.zip', '/nix/store/6qk2ybm2yx2dxmx9h4dikr1shjhhbpfr-python3-3.10.11/lib/python3.10', '/nix/store/6qk2ybm2yx2dxmx9h4dikr1shjhhbpfr-python3-3.10.11/lib/python3.10/lib-dynload', '/nix/store/6qk2ybm2yx2dxmx9h4dikr1shjhhbpfr-python3-3.10.11/lib/python3.10/site-packages', '/nix/store/qyy1khnfvvv6m57gkh8qijj45v3h78jy-python3-3.10.11-env/lib/python3.10/site-packages', ] USER_BASE: '/home/asymmetric/.local' (exists) USER_SITE: '/home/asymmetric/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages' (doesn't exist) ENABLE_USER_SITE: False poetry run python -m site sys.path = [ '/home/asymmetric/code/foo',
